calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-20-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Brenda Fields.
Petitioner, Jin Cheng Tang present in pro per with Cantonese interpreter Jenna Zhang, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Jin Cheng Tong.
Decree signed in open court.
